working_on: Routine task AUDIT-HT-1 (T-PHASE-5-AUDIT) — first half of decomposed-AUDIT-HT (decomposed at S-0117 administrative close per Issue #58 because the original 96-edge + 10-node + 3-trace single-task scope hit context cap mid-authoring). Scope: 5 top hubs by total degree (epistemic_justification deg 14, existence 11, propositional_knowledge 11, causation 10, physicalism 10) under full incident-edge review — 54 unique incident edges (56 raw with 2 inter-hub overlaps deduped: epistemic_justification → propositional_knowledge counted once; existence → causation counted once) plus 5 per-node reviews on the hub nodes themselves. Single deliverable: engine/build_readiness/phase_5_production_audit_evidence/hubs_1_5.md per master-plan §T1-A prompt template + §"Per-node prompt template" + §"Evidence file schema (fixed)". Routine-mode is parametric-only — empirical-fortification branch prohibited per master-plan §"Empirical-fortification branch" routine-mode prohibition (load-bearing until T1-A through T1-D close at the closeout interactive session per ADR 0053).
declared_scope: Author engine/build_readiness/phase_5_production_audit_evidence/hubs_1_5.md as candidate-findings evidence for the 54-edge full-incident-edge sample (epistemic_justification 14 / existence 11 / propositional_knowledge 11 / causation 10 / physicalism 10 raw, 2 inter-hub overlaps deduped to 54 unique) plus the 5-hub-node sample — verdict + SEP-anchored reasoning + confidence per element per the verbatim master-plan prompt templates and evidence-file schema. No other tracked files modified beyond the operational allowlist (current.json, current_plan.md, auto_target.json status fields, register_state.json, archive/S-0119.json, ENGINE_LOG.md, STATE.md, HANDOFF.md). Parametric-only review; empirical-fortification branch prohibited for routine sessions until T1-A through T1-D close at the closeout. phase: NA-routine

scope_delivery.explanation: Yes — AUDIT-HT-1 fully delivered: 54-edge + 5-node SEP-anchored review landed in hubs_1_5.md (537 lines) per the master-plan prompt templates and evidence-file schema; both task criteria pass (file_exists + validate_passes); no descope, reorder, or deferral mid-session. Parametric-only review per master-plan §"Empirical-fortification branch" routine-mode prohibition; medium-confidence + mutation-implying verdicts (E-14 reversed, E-28 defensible, E-29 reversed, E-52 defensible, E-54 reversed) get fortified at the closeout. No HANDOFF entries; no Issues filed (all findings recorded as evidence per master-plan candidate-findings-only scope). Cadence trigger overdue by 3 (slots-since-last-audit 23 vs cadence 20); deferred per session scope (routine fire's scope is the AUDIT-HT-1 task, not health-check audit); next interactive session re-evaluates.

outcome_summary: Routine session S-0119 against T-PHASE-5-AUDIT task AUDIT-HT-1 landed a 54-edge + 5-node SEP-anchored review per the master-plan prompt templates at engine/build_readiness/phase_5_production_audit.md (per S-0082 master-plan + S-0081 audit-warrant gate decision drawer in paideia/decisions; per S-0104 cross-bridge calibration; per S-0105 epistemology + S-0108 ethics + S-0109 metaphysics + S-0110 mind + S-0111 logic + S-0112 language + S-0113 science + S-0114 political + S-0115 aesthetics + S-0116 service precedents; per S-0107 master-plan tightening that made the empirical-fortification branch routine-mode prohibition load-bearing; per S-0117 administrative close per Issue #58 that decomposed the original AUDIT-HT into AUDIT-HT-1 + AUDIT-HT-2 to fit context cap). Single deliverable: engine/build_readiness/phase_5_production_audit_evidence/hubs_1_5.md (537 lines). Hub identification by parametric scan of the 15 Phase 5 seed migrations: epistemic_justification (epistemology, deg 14 — 11 out + 3 in), existence (metaphysics, deg 11 — 10 out + 1 in), propositional_knowledge (epistemology, deg 11 — 8 out + 3 in), causation (metaphysics, deg 10 — 6 out + 4 in), physicalism (mind, deg 10 — 8 out + 2 in). 54 unique incident edges (56 raw with 2 inter-hub overlaps deduped: epistemic_justification → propositional_knowledge counted once across HUB A and HUB C; existence → causation counted once across HUB B and HUB D). Sample density: 100% on incident edges per master-plan §"Sample-size policy" hubs row — hubs are calibration anchors, not a stochastic sample. Edge-verdict tally: 47 sound (43 sound-high + 4 sound-medium) + 2 defensible-medium (E-28 propositional_knowledge → justified_true_belief — concept-to-classical-analysis defensibility distinct in shape from prior reversal patterns; E-52 physicalism → easy_problems_of_consciousness — framing-device-vs-position ambiguity around the Chalmers 1995 easy/hard distinction) + 3 reversed-medium (E-14 epistemic_justification → propositional_attitude — cross-bridge-inverting-genus-species, cross-bridge from species-as-property-of-belief to broader genus propositional_attitude in the philosophy-of-mind sense; E-29 propositional_knowledge → knowledge — within-cluster species-to-genus-inversion contradicting the migration's own teaching_notes which frame knowledge as the genus and pk as the analyzed species; E-54 physicalism → reductionism_in_science — cross-bridge-inverting-broader-thesis-and-application) + 2 historical-not-pedagogical-high (E-43 aristotelian_four_causes → causation; E-53 greek_atomism → physicalism — both cross-bridges from history-terminator service nodes to substantive subdomain concepts where the relation is influence not prerequisite per master-plan §"Per-edge prompt template" verdict (e), with both source nodes being literal named-examples in the master-plan §"Per-node prompt template" granularity-mismatch list — "Aristotelian Four Causes" + Vienna-Circle-class school-name greek_atomism). Node-verdict tally: 5 sound-high (no granularity-mismatches; all 5 hubs concept-level appropriate — epistemic_justification, existence, propositional_knowledge, causation, physicalism are specific philosophical concepts with precise dialectical content, not discipline-labels or school-names). Substantive-defect rate 7/59 = 11.9% — in band with prior subdomains (S-0115 aesthetics 5.3%, S-0114 political 10%, S-0113 science 10.5%, S-0110 mind 10.8%, S-0109 metaphysics 14.3%, S-0108 ethics 16.7%, S-0112 language 21%, S-0116 service 22%); below the cross-bridge baseline (35.2% per AUDIT-CB at S-0104) and well below the within-session expansion trigger (60% mid-sample). The hub-centrality finding validates as defense-side: the graph's most-central nodes are NOT the principal locus of substantive defects (87% sound across the 54 incident edges; all 5 hub nodes sound-high), suggesting the per-subdomain defect rates concentrate in lower-degree edges and nodes rather than the structural backbone. Three pattern-aggregation surfaces strengthened for the closeout: (1) HISTORICAL_INFLUENCE PREDICATE-ACTIVATION continued strengthening — the master-plan §"Structural reopen pre-flag" 10+ ADR-warranting threshold was already cleared at S-0104 + S-0116; this fire extends coverage from cross-bridges (S-0104) and within-service edges (S-0116) to the cross-bridge-from-history-terminator-to-substantive-domain class (E-43 + E-53 — both HIGH-confidence with literal named-example sources), bringing the cumulative count to 16+ historical-not-pedagogical findings across S-0081 / S-0104 / S-0116 / S-0119; AUDIT-HT-2 may add further history-terminator-anchored cross-bridge findings (vienna_circle_logical_positivism is in HUB 6–10 scope per the auto_target task description); the closeout's predicate-activation memo has decisive evidence; (2) NEW cross-cluster genus-species-inversion shape clustering across E-14 + E-29 + E-54 (three REVERSED findings in this single fire, two cross-bridges and one within-cluster) — distinct from prior routine-block reversal patterns (S-0112 tools-vs-position, S-0114 question-vs-answer, S-0105 frameworks-vs-motivations, S-0108 position-vs-criterion, S-0110 argument-vs-position, S-0112 / S-0113 developmental-arc, S-0115 cross-cluster-theoretical-thread-ordering); the shape is "more-specific concept (or specific application) is taught before the broader genus (or broader methodological thesis) that contains or generalizes it"; closeout may propose a `cross_bridge_genus_species_direction_inverted` validator soft-warn in addition to the four pre-listed proposals at master-plan §"Audit-system-input proposals"; (3) HUB-CENTRALITY DEFENSE-SIDE finding — top-5 hubs predominantly sound (87% edge-soundness, 100% node-soundness); the closeout's audit summary can record this as evidence that the graph's structural backbone is not the principal locus of defect, with the lower-degree subdomain defect rates (5–22%) concentrating elsewhere; AUDIT-HT-2 (hubs 6–10 + 3 syllabus traces) extends the calibration to the next 5 hubs and tests whether the trend holds. No new gate-feasible audit-system-input class authored as deliverable — the four pre-listed master-plan proposals + S-0104's `cross_bridge_pedagogical_direction_inconsistent_with_summary` candidate + S-0110's argument-vs-position directionality candidate + S-0116's `cluster_root_node_as_prereq` extension candidate were not extended at this routine layer; the new `cross_bridge_genus_species_direction_inverted` shape is recorded as a candidate observation. Empty `evidence` field uniform null across all 54 sampled hub-incident edges (master-plan §T2-E pre-listed; twelfth session in a row confirming graph-wide). Parametric-only review per master-plan §"Empirical-fortification branch" routine-mode prohibition (load-bearing until T1-A through T1-D close at the closeout per ADR 0053); medium-confidence + mutation-implying verdicts (E-14, E-28, E-29, E-52, E-54) get fortified at the closeout per master-plan §"Forward pointers to closeout" / ADR 0059. 0 HANDOFF entries; 0 Issues filed (all findings recorded as evidence per master-plan candidate-findings-only scope; disposition is interactive at closeout). Cadence trigger overdue by 3 (slots-since-last-audit 23 vs cadence 20); deferred per session scope (routine fire's scope is the AUDIT-HT-1 task); next interactive session re-evaluates and may run health_check.py against the S-0098 → S-0119 window. AUDIT-HT-1 criteria pass (file_exists + validate_passes); marked complete in close commit. Next eligible task: AUDIT-HT-2 (hubs 6–10 — classical_logic, meaning, normative_ethics, vienna_circle_logical_positivism, aristotelian_four_causes — plus 3 diagnostic syllabus traces gettier_problem / modal_realism / social_contract_theory; depends_on AUDIT-HT-1 now satisfied; sequential after AUDIT-HT-1 to prevent two-fire race on the decomposed halves). After AUDIT-HT-2 closes, T-PHASE-5-AUDIT is target-met and routines exit at step 3 thereafter; user runs interactive audit closeout.
